name: Snickerdoodles
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the shortening and sugar together for 30 seconds.
2. Beat in the white vinegar.
3. Add the all-purpose flour, cream of tartar, baking soda, and salt. Mix well until combined.
4. Form the dough into 1-inch balls.
5. Roll each ball in the cinnamon-sugar mixture.
6. Place the balls about 2 inches apart on an ungreased cookie sheet.
7. Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes.
8. Cool the cookies on wire racks.
